rulings.Case Title: 1367 NATOMA ST SF, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. GJ CREATIVE EQUITY GROUP LLC, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 2, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT JENNIFER JONES' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Settlement on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BAYSIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT DBA GRODON PROPERTY VS. MEREDITH CRAWFORD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; And Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 2, 2024 line 11. DEFENDANT MEREDITH CRAWFORD'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry their burden and show surprise, mistake or excusable neglect. Moving party also did not provide any explanation for not seeking the relief after learning of the default on or about March 1, 2024. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ROGER JOINER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 2, 2024 line 14. DEFENDANT ROGER JOINER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is DENIED. The Notice of Motion indicates that the ground for the motion is "that the summons violates statutory requirements." The Points and Authorities contain no argument or authority addressing any defect in the summons. The Court further notes that Exhibit A filed 7 days after the filing of the motion is not authenticated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
